---
title: "Double Jeopardy: Closing Civic Space, Restrictions on Religion, and Faith-Based NGOs"
format: 
  gfm: 
    wrap: preserve
    toc: false
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.qmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "README-",
  fig.retina = 3
)

library(emoji)

# yaml_metadata <- rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter("index.qmd")
# title <- yaml_metadata$title
# abstract <- yaml_metadata$abstract
```

## `r emoji_glue(":rock::worm:")`: Note on "xenolithic xenoturbella" project name

Because project titles change all the time with revisions, rewriting, and peer review, I used [{codename}](http://svmiller.com/codename/) to generate an [Ubuntu-style](https://wiki.ubuntu.com/DevelopmentCodeNames) internal-to-me project name that won't change.

```{.r}
library(codename)
codename_message()
#> code name generated by {codename} v.0.5.0. R version 4.6.0 (2026-04-24).

codename(type = "ubuntu", "double jeopardy")
#> [1] "xenolithic xenoturbella"
```
